data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Verified committed code (ac239337): getDisplayedBeatAliases now takes Pick<Beat, 'id' | 'aliases'>, deduplicates against beat.id, and preserves full project-qualified aliases. Header renders format 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)' with ClickToCopyId on both. Tests cover dedup, cross-project retention, and null cases. All quality gates pass (tests, typecheck, lint on changed files). Note: working tree has uncommitted changes that revert the fix — these should be investigated/discarded by the next actor.
